nasb.text: Then the sons of Israel did so; and Joseph gave them wagons according to the command of Pharaoh, and gave them provisions for the journey.

esv.text: The sons of Israel did so: and Joseph gave them wagons, according to the command of Pharaoh, and gave them provisions for the journey.

cnv.text: 以色列的兒子們就照樣作了。約瑟照著法老所吩咐的，給了他們一些車輛和路上用的食物。

ccb.text: 以色列的儿子们答应了。约瑟遵照法老的吩咐，为他的弟兄们预备好车辆和路上需用的粮食，

csbs.text: 以色列的儿子们就如此做了。约瑟照着法老的吩咐，给了他们车辆和路上用的食物，
